steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence describes the 2022 World Cup with 32 teams from six continents. The second sentence then discusses the 1954 World Cup with only 16 teams, mostly from Europe and the Americas. The word “only” and the numerical difference signal a comparison between two historical periods.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: “In contrast” directly marks this difference between a modern, globally diverse World Cup and an older, regionally limited one. “In other words” restates, “For instance” exemplifies a prior claim, and “Therefore” implies causality — none fit this type of historical comparison. That matches choice B — B is correct.
